data.title: VinFast VF 9 redefines prestige in Canada's EV market. 8.6% of new vehicles are zero-emission, Quebec leads with 11%.
data.description: In Markham, Ontario, prestige is redefined as clean lines, calm power, and bold elegance in the world of electric vehicles. Despite the growth in electric vehicle sales in Canada, adoption rates are inconsistent. As of Q2 2025, zero-emission vehicles accounted for approximately 8.6% of new vehicle registrations across the country. Quebec stands out with a share exceeding 11%. In this landscape, a top-tier electric SUV must offer more than just style.

data.title: Donald Trump's son Eric believes stablecoins could "save" the US dollar, defends family's crypto ventures amid conflict-of-interest worries.
data.description: In a recent statement, Eric Trump, son of the US President Donald Trump, expressed his belief that stablecoins have the potential to "rescue" the US dollar. He also stood by his family's involvement in cryptocurrency initiatives, dismissing growing worries about conflicts of interest. Trump's remarks highlight the growing interest in stablecoins as a solution for the stability of the US dollar in the financial market. The endorsement from a prominent figure like Eric Trump adds weight to the ongoing discussion around the future of digital currencies. The statement comes amidst increasing scrutiny and speculation around the involvement of high-profile individuals in the cryptocurrency sector. This development underscores the significance of stablecoins as a potential mechanism to address currency challenges.

data.title: Dow gains over 250 points, NASDAQ rises 0.31%, S&P 500 up 0.47%. Fed's key inflation gauge highest since 2025. Energy shares jump by 1%.
data.description: U.S. stocks were up with the Dow Jones index gaining over 250 points on Friday, reaching 46,213.26, a 0.58% increase. The NASDAQ also rose 0.31% to 22,455.17 and the S&P 500 rose by 0.47% to 6,636.07. Energy sector shares jumped by 1% while consumer staples stocks fell 0.3%. The Federal Reserve's PCE price index rose to 2.7% in August, the highest level since February 2025, with monthly inflation accelerating to 0.3%. MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies Inc. saw its shares soar 155% to $3.74 after announcing deployment plans. This news is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Global cloud kitchen market valued at $118.18 billion in 2024, projected to reach $195.96 billion in 2031 - Valuates Reports.
data.description: In Bangalore, India, as of September 26, 2025, the global market size for Cloud Kitchen (Delivery-only Restaurants) reached USD 118180 million in 2024. It is anticipated to grow and attain a new valuation of USD 195960 million in the coming years.

data.title: ComEd offers $175,000 in scholarships for college & trades students in energy fields, with awards up to $10,000 each.
data.description: In Chicago, ComEd disclosed that it has launched the application process for its Future of Energy scholarship initiative, offering a total of $175,000 in scholarships. Eligible students interested in a career in the energy sector can now apply for scholarships from $1,000 to $10,000 until November 16, 2025. This program aims to support students pursuing energy-related trades training or STEM majors in college. It provides an opportunity for local students to receive financial assistance for their educational aspirations.
